joke: My phone autocorrected "I love you" to "I lava you." Now I'm dating a volcano.
Why did the ketchup packet go to therapy? Because it couldn't ketchup with the conversation!
Why did the aardvark get impatient? Because it kept saying "I'll work, I'll work!"
Why did the calendar get a restraining order? It kept showing up on all the wrong dates!
Why did the socks go on strike? Because they were tired of being walked all over!
Why did the emoji go to therapy? Because it had too many feelings!
Why did the stapler get a promotion? Because it always knew how to hold things together!
Why did the comedian become an existentialist? Because he kept asking "Why am I here?" and the audience kept saying "You're not!"
Why did the audience become a black hole? Because it kept rejecting everything!
Why did the void apply for a job? Because it heard they were hiring... and it had nothing to offer!
Why did the silence get a standing ovation? Because it was the only thing that didn't get booed off stage!
Why did the cardboard box go to therapy? Because it couldn't handle the pressure!
Why did the universe get booed off stage? Because its punchline was... existence!
Why did the hope get lost? Because it kept looking for the silver lining!
Why did the darkness get a promotion? Because it was always in the light!
Why was the math book sad? Because it had too many problems!
Why did the cloud get fired? Because it wasn't making any rain!
Why did the audience become a black hole? Because it kept rejecting everything!
Why did the golfer bring two pairs of pants? In case he got a hole in one!
Why did the chair go to therapy? Because it had too many issues!
Why did the coffee file a police report? Because it got mugged!
Why did the volcano get married? Because it finally found someone who said "I do... I do!"
Why did the bicycle fall over? Because it was two-tired!
Why did the door get a promotion? Because it always knew how to open up opportunities!
Why did the letter Q go to therapy? Because it felt so out of place!
Why did the moon get a job? Because it had the best night shift!
Why did the person go to the doctor? Because they couldn't take a breath!
Why did the rumor get a promotion? Because it always went straight to the top!
Why did the ghost get a job? Because it had a boo-tiful resume!
Why did the vacuum cleaner get fired? Because it sucked at its job!
